steps.title: Identify the hypotenuse and leg
steps.content: The right angle is at $S$, so $TR$ is the hypotenuse with $TR=53$. The given leg is $RS=\sqrt{105}$.

steps.title: Compute the sine ratio
steps.content: From angle $R$, the opposite side is $TS=52$ and the hypotenuse is $TR=53$: $$\sin R=\frac{52}{53}\approx0.9811.$$ The answer is 52/53 or .9811.
